steps.t: Sversting can likely be found about the forges on the lowest level of the Oath-taker's Horn. Spakorth has asked you to seek his brethren with the Oath…
Dréri, Náth, and Freki can likely be found on the central level of the Oath-taker's Horn amidst the Firehorn barracks. Sversting proved fiercely loyal…
Eitur can likely be found in Zôreth's chambers on the highest level of the Oath-taker's Horn. You have found all of Spakorth's brethren except for Eit…
Spakorth can be found in the doorway to Zôreth's chambers alongside Gimli. You have found all of Spakorth's brethren, but unfortunately Sversting and …
